title: Charter: Stability In Q3 Results, 10%+ Free Cash Flow Yield
text: Charter's Q3 results on Friday sent its share price up another 3.7%, but shares remain 55% down from their peak in September 2021. Despite macro headwinds, Internet revenues grew both year-on-year and sequentially; Free Cash Flow grew 5% excluding one-offs.

title: Charter (CHTR) Q3 Earnings Lag, Internet User Base Up Y/Y
text: Charter's (CHTR) third-quarter 2022 results reflect continued growth in residential, mobile and advertising revenues.

title: Charter Communications, Inc. (CHTR) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Charter Communications, Inc. (NASDAQ:CHTR ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 28, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Stefan Anninger - Head of Investor Relations Tom Rutledge - Chairman & Chief Executive Officer Chris Winfrey - Chief Operating Officer Jessica Fischer - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Doug Mitchelson - Credit Suisse Benjamin Swinburne - Morgan Stanley Craig Moffett - MoffettNathanson Philip Cusick - JPMorgan Jonathan Chaplin - New Street Vijay Jayant - Evercore Peter Supino - Wolf Research Brett Feldman - Goldman Sachs Michael Rollins - Citi Operator Hello, and welcome to the Charter Communications Third Quarter 2022 Investor Call. We ask that you please hold all questions until the completion of the formal remarks, at which time you will be given instruction for the question-and-answer session.

title: Charter Communications (CHTR) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Lag Estimates
text: Charter (CHTR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -7.05% and 0.82%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Charter shows growth in internet subscribers, but earnings miss
text: Charter Communications Inc. CHTR, +3.01% saw an increase in its count of residential internet customers during the latest quarter, but the cable giant fell short of expectations on earnings. The company recorded third-quarter net income of $1.19 billion, or $7.38 a share, compared with $1.22 billion, or $6.69 a share, in the year-earlier period.

title: Charter Announces Third Quarter 2022 Results
text: STAMFORD, Conn. , Oct. 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Charter Communications, Inc. (along with its subsidiaries, the "Company" or "Charter") today reported financial and operating results for the three and nine months ended September 30, 2022.

title: 7 Telecom Stocks to Sell Pronto Before a Painful Downturn
text: Telecom stocks have taken a hit over the past few years. Most companies in the space have been struggling under the weight of their massive debt loads as they upgrade their infrastructure to support 5G.

title: What's in Store for Charter Communications' (CHTR) Q3 Earnings?
text: Charter Communications (CHTR) third-quarter 2022 earnings are expected to have been affected by declining internet subscribers and increasing competition in the video streaming space.

title: Charter's (CHTR) Spectrum Expands Operations in Loudon County
text: Charter Communications (CHTR) is expanding operations in Loudon County to bring Spectrum services to more than 1000 homes and small businesses in Wexford County,,MI.

title: Why Charter (CHTR) is Poised to Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: Charter (CHTR) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Jim Cramer goes over the best and worst Q3 performers in the S&P 500
text: Cramer said he wouldn't touch this stock with a 10 foot pole.

title: Charter's (CHTR) Spectrum Expands Footprint in Wexford County
text: Charter Communications (CHTR) is expanding operations in Wexford County to bring Spectrum services to more than 4700 homes and small businesses in Wexford County, MI.

title: 3 Stocks That Could Soar When Inflation Abates and Interest Rates Moderate
text: Concerns about inflation and interest rates have depressed these stocks

title: Charter: Unfairly Punished In September Market Correction
text: Charter shares lost 24% during the September correction, we believe unfairly, and rebounded 9% in the first three days of October. Shares are down 60% from their peak and are at a 10.5% tax-adjusted Free Cash Flow Yield, which should help limit further downside.

title: CHARTER AWARDS $1.1 MILLION IN SPECTRUM DIGITAL EDUCATION GRANTS TO 47 ORGANIZATIONS TO ADVANCE BROADBAND TRAINING AND TECHNOLOGY
text: Latest Round of Grants Boosts Charter's Investment in Local Digital Literacy Programs to $8 Million in Six Years STAMFORD, Conn. , Oct. 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Charter Communications, Inc. today announced the award of $1.1 million in Spectrum Digital Education grants to 47 nonprofits working to enhance digital education, training and technology in local communities.

title: Charter's (CHTR) Spectrum News Beats Peers for Daily Views
text: Charter Communications (CHTR) Spectrum news averaged 2.2 million daily views across its local linear and digital platforms outpacing its peers.

title: BetterInvesting™ Magazine Update on Copart Inc. and Charter Communications Inc.
text: TROY, Mich. , Oct. 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Editorial Advisory and Securities Review Committee of BetterInvesting Magazine today announced Copart Inc. (NASDAQ: CPRT) as its "Stock to Study" and Charter Communications Inc. (NASDAQ: CHTR) as its "Undervalued Stock" in the December 2022 issue for investors' informational and educational use.
